Buatkan saya sebuah WebApp Al-Qur'an Online lengkap dengan fitur berikut.

🎯 TUJUAN

Aplikasi Al-Qur’an online modern, ringan, responsif, dan siap deploy ke Vercel atau Cloudflare Pages.

Gunakan:

HTML

CSS

Vanilla JavaScript (tanpa framework berat)

Fetch API

Struktur folder rapi

Clean code

Siap production

📌 FITUR UTAMA
1️⃣ Daftar 114 Surah

Ambil data dari API publik:
Gunakan API dari https://api.alquran.cloud/v1

Tampilkan:

Nomor surah

Nama Arab

Nama Latin

Arti

Jumlah ayat

Makkiyah/Madaniyah

Search bar

Loading state

2️⃣ Halaman Detail Surah

Ketika surah diklik, tampilkan semua ayat dengan format:

[Nomor Ayat]
[Teks Arab ukuran besar & jelas]
[Latin (transliterasi)]
[Terjemahan Bahasa Indonesia]
[Tombol Play Audio Ayat]

Gunakan endpoint:

Arabic text

Indonesian translation

Transliteration

Audio

Pastikan:

Audio bisa play per ayat

Bisa pause

Tidak tabrakan audio sebelumnya

3️⃣ UI & DESIGN

Gunakan:

Warna utama hijau islami (#0f766e)

Background putih/soft cream

Font Arab: "Amiri" dari Google Fonts

Font Latin: Poppins / Inter

Card design modern

Shadow halus

Hover effect

Smooth scroll

Fade animation saat buka surah

Responsive:

Mobile first

Tablet

Desktop

4️⃣ FITUR TAMBAHAN

Tambahkan:

✅ Dark Mode toggle (simpan ke localStorage)
✅ Bookmark ayat (localStorage)
✅ Last Read position (localStorage)
✅ Ukuran font bisa diperbesar/diperkecil
✅ Copy ayat
✅ Share ayat (Web Share API jika tersedia)

5️⃣ HALAMAN BELAJAR TAJWID

Buat halaman tambahan:
“Belajar Membaca Al-Qur'an”

Berisi:

Huruf Hijaiyah

Cara pengucapan

Tajwid dasar:

Idzhar

Idgham

Ikhfa

Iqlab

Penjelasan singkat

Contoh sederhana

Layout tetap konsisten dengan halaman utama.

6️⃣ STRUKTUR FILE

Buatkan struktur seperti ini:

/index.html
/surah.html
/tajwid.html
/css/style.css
/js/app.js

Semua file lengkap dan siap deploy.

7️⃣ SEO & META

Tambahkan:

Meta title

Meta description

Open Graph

Favicon islami sederhana (SVG)

8️⃣ KUALITAS CODE

Pastikan:

Tidak ada error

Clean & terstruktur

Komentar seperlunya

Tidak menggunakan library berat

Cepat di-load

9️⃣ OUTPUT

Berikan:

Semua file lengkap

Tidak terpotong

Tidak diringkas

Siap langsung di-copy

**Defining Project Parameters**

I'm translating the user's request for an online Quran app into a React SPA. My plan involves using TypeScript and Tailwind CSS. Right now, I'm focusing on the core user features required, which will inform the overall architecture. I will be sure to address and take into account the user's initial preference for "vanilla Javascript."


**Analyzing React Implementation Strategy**

I'm now prioritizing a lightweight React application that delivers a performant and modern user experience, addressing the initial "vanilla JavaScript" preference by optimizing for speed and simplicity. The user's requested folder structure and multiple HTML files will be translated to a SPA using a simple state-based or hash router. I plan to use React components for the `HomePage`, `SurahDetailPage`, and `TajwidPage`.


**Mapping User Features to React Components**

I've carefully considered the core components needed to translate the online Quran app idea into a React SPA. The focus is now on mapping features like the list of 114 Surahs from the API (`https://api.alquran.cloud/v1/surah`) to React components. I'm prioritizing the `HomePage` as a key component to start with, where I'll build a list of cards, each displaying essential Surah details. This will directly address the user's initial requirements while adhering to the React SPA approach. The plan includes the `App.tsx` handling the routing and global states, and an efficient component structure for each feature.


**Refining App Architecture**

I'm now focusing on a robust application architecture. I will use a component-based structure. I'm prioritizing the `App.tsx` component to handle routing and global state (like dark mode). The `HomePage` will be structured to display a list of surah cards, each with Arabic and Latin names, with a click navigating to a Surah detail page. The Surah Detail Page is being worked on to show the full ayah along with audio playback functionality.


**Defining Application Scope**

I'm now clarifying the scope of this React app, prioritizing a lightweight and performant application, and translating the user's initial preference for "vanilla JavaScript" into a modern React approach using TypeScript and Tailwind CSS. The app will be structured as a Single Page Application (SPA) using a simple state-based router. I will be building the core components, which will be the `HomePage`, the `SurahDetailPage`, and the `TajwidPage`.

I am aiming for an architecture that directly responds to the provided API: `https://api.alquran.cloud/v1/surah`, and the subsequent need for routing and state management. The `index.html` file will be a basic HTML shell. I am preparing to implement features such as displaying surah lists with details, Surah details page and audio playback for each ayah. I am taking into account features such as Dark Mode toggling and bookmark functionalities.


**Defining App Architecture**

I am now focusing on the architecture for the React Quran app, emphasizing a component-based approach. The plan is to create `metadata.json` for app details and utilize `index.html` as the basic HTML. I'll handle routing and global state using `App.tsx`, with `HomePage`, `SurahDetailPage`, and `TajwidPage` as core components. The `SurahDetailPage` will handle audio playback and "last read" functionality, while Tailwind CSS will handle styling.


**Defining Component Structure**

Now I'm focusing on defining the component structure and creating the essential files. I'm starting with `metadata.json` for app details, the basic `index.html` shell, and `index.tsx` for the React entry point. The plan includes an `App.tsx` component that handles routing and global state (dark mode), and core components like `HomePage`, `SurahDetailPage`, and `TajwidPage`. I'll also add reusable components for Surah and Ayah cards, along with services for fetching Quran API. The `TajwidPage` will contain static content, while the Surah Detail Page integrates audio playback.


**Refining Feature Implementation**

I'm now detailing component-specific logic and file structures to deliver a robust online Quran React app. I have finalized the core plan for feature implementation, covering features such as listing surahs, handling surah detail pages with audio playback, a dark mode toggle, bookmark functionalities, "last read" tracking, font size control, and also copy and share ayah features. I am prioritizing a modular and maintainable design using reusable components and service files. I'm focusing on defining component structures such as `HomePage`, `SurahDetailPage`, and `TajwidPage`.


**Defining Implementation Sequence**

I'm now outlining a step-by-step implementation plan, starting with essential files like `metadata.json` and `index.html`. Then, I'll work on the entry point (`index.tsx`), and the critical type definitions in `types.ts`. I will prioritize a smooth UI and smooth UX. Next, custom hooks for local storage will be defined, followed by service files, and core components.

Belajar Membaca Al-Qur'an

Panduan dasar Tajwid untuk pemula.

Huruf Hijaiyah adalah alfabet dalam bahasa Arab, yang menjadi dasar membaca Al-Qur'an. Terdapat 28 huruf utama.

ا ب ت ث ج ح خ د ذ ر ز س ش ص ض ط ظ ع غ ف ق ك ل م ن و ه ء ي

Penting untuk mempelajari cara pengucapan (makhraj) dan sifat setiap huruf dengan benar.

Ini adalah salah satu hukum tajwid paling dasar yang mengatur bagaimana Nun Sukun atau Tanwin dibaca ketika bertemu dengan huruf-huruf tertentu.

1. Idzhar (إظهار) - Jelas

Dibaca jelas tanpa dengung. Terjadi jika Nun Sukun/Tanwin bertemu dengan salah satu dari 6 huruf halq (tenggorokan): ء هـ ع ح غ خ.

Contoh: مِنْ خَيْرٍ

2. Idgham (إدغام) - Melebur

Meleburkan suara Nun Sukun/Tanwin ke huruf berikutnya. Terbagi dua:

  • Idgham Bi Ghunnah (dengan dengung): bertemu huruf ي ن م و. Contoh: مَنْ يَعْمَلْ
  • Idgham Bila Ghunnah (tanpa dengung): bertemu huruf ل ر. Contoh: مِنْ رَبِّهِمْ

3. Iqlab (إقلاب) - Mengganti

Mengganti suara Nun Sukun/Tanwin menjadi suara Mim (م) disertai dengung. Terjadi jika bertemu huruf ب.

Contoh: مِنْ بَعْدِ

4. Ikhfa' (إخفاء) - Samar

Menyamarkan suara Nun Sukun/Tanwin dengan dengung. Terjadi jika bertemu dengan 15 huruf sisa selain huruf-huruf di atas.

Contoh: إِنْسَانٌ

Belajar Membaca Al-Qur'an

Panduan dasar Tajwid untuk pemula.

Huruf Hijaiyah adalah alfabet dalam bahasa Arab, yang menjadi dasar membaca Al-Qur'an. Terdapat 28 huruf utama.

ا ب ت ث ج ح خ د ذ ر ز س ش ص ض ط ظ ع غ ف ق ك ل م ن و ه ء ي

Penting untuk mempelajari cara pengucapan (makhraj) dan sifat setiap huruf dengan benar.

Ini adalah salah satu hukum tajwid paling dasar yang mengatur bagaimana Nun Sukun atau Tanwin dibaca ketika bertemu dengan huruf-huruf tertentu.

1. Idzhar (إظهار) - Jelas

Dibaca jelas tanpa dengung. Terjadi jika Nun Sukun/Tanwin bertemu dengan salah satu dari 6 huruf halq (tenggorokan): ء هـ ع ح غ خ.

Contoh: مِنْ خَيْرٍ

2. Idgham (إدغام) - Melebur

Meleburkan suara Nun Sukun/Tanwin ke huruf berikutnya. Terbagi dua:

  • Idgham Bi Ghunnah (dengan dengung): bertemu huruf ي ن م و. Contoh: مَنْ يَعْمَلْ
  • Idgham Bila Ghunnah (tanpa dengung): bertemu huruf ل ر. Contoh: مِنْ رَبِّهِمْ

3. Iqlab (إقلاب) - Mengganti

Mengganti suara Nun Sukun/Tanwin menjadi suara Mim (م) disertai dengung. Terjadi jika bertemu huruf ب.

Contoh: مِنْ بَعْدِ

4. Ikhfa' (إخفاء) - Samar

Menyamarkan suara Nun Sukun/Tanwin dengan dengung. Terjadi jika bertemu dengan 15 huruf sisa selain huruf-huruf di atas.

Contoh: إِنْسَانٌ
